title: Assorted Jellyroos Christmas with Beads Inside (15 cm) 1 Pc. - Squeezable & Adorable Toy, Perfect for Kids Party Favors, Stress Relief, Sensory Play, & Festive Gift
features: ASSORTED & ADORABLE DESIGN: Get 1 out of 4 festive designs: snowman, Santa, elf, or reindeer. These plush holiday characters (15 cm) are filled with jelly balls, bringing joy and delight to your kids or loved ones during the Christmas season.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Our Christmas jellyroos are crafted with premium materials, ensuring a soft, cuddly, and durable toy that's both fun and safe to play with. Rest easy knowing your little ones are enjoying quality playtime.

STRESS RELIEF & SENSORY PLAY: Squeezing these jellyroos and feeling the beads inside can provide a soothing and tactile sensation. It's a great way to reduce stress, help with anxiety, and promote fine motor skills for children and adults alike.

PERFECT GIFT & PARTY FAVOR: Make your holiday celebrations complete with these squeezable, charming, and lovable toys. Ideal for stocking stuffers, party favors, or as a surprise gift for the kids and collectors in your life.

WIDE RANGE OF USES: Beyond festive decorations and memorable gifts, these delightful Christmas jellyroos can also be used as sensory toys, stress-relief companions, cake toppers, or simply as an adorable addition to your holiday-themed décor!
description: Introducing the assorted jellyroos Christmas with beads inside, a festive delight that combines fun, excitement, and sensory engagement in one adorable package. Measuring 15 cm and filled with colorful beads, this squeezable toy is an instant hit among kids and a perfect party favor. Its sensory appeal aids in stress relief and provides an engaging play experience. Whether you're planning a party or looking for the perfect festive gift, the jellyroos Christmas provides a unique blend of fun, festivity, and tactile engagement.
